call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. Yeah, I was just looking at options. 
Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. That's, uh, based on the information you provided. What are you hoping to use the funds for, if you don't mind me asking? 
Eleanor: I'm planning a kitchen renovation. It's… it's been a long time coming. 
Agent: Fantastic! A kitchen renovation is a great investment. Now, with this loan, you'd have fixed monthly payments over, say, a five-year term. We can adjust that, of course. The total cost, including interest, would be… let me just calculate… around $19,300. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, that's… a little more than I was hoping for. 
Agent: I understand. We can explore different terms to lower the monthly payment, but it will increase the total interest paid. Or, we can look at a slightly smaller loan amount. 
Eleanor: Maybe $8,000? 
Agent: Let me check… Yes, absolutely. An $8,000 Personal Loan at 8.99% would have monthly payments of approximately $155 for five years. Total cost would be around $9,300. 
Eleanor: That sounds much better. 
Agent: Excellent! So, we can proceed with the application process. It's all done online, very quick and easy. Do you have your driver's license and social security number handy? 
Eleanor: Yes, I do. Okay, let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I'm on a fixed income! 
Agent: Well, sir, it depends on your credit… 
Robert: (Hangs up abruptly)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a Personal Loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark from GreenTech said you guys were good. I'm looking at consolidating some debt. 
Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. That's a fantastic rate, especially given the current market. What kind of debt are you looking to consolidate? 
Jessica: Mostly credit card debt. It's… it's getting out of hand. 
Agent: I understand. High-interest credit card debt can be a real burden. With this loan, you'd have one fixed monthly payment, potentially saving you a significant amount of money. Let's look at a five-year term. Your monthly payment would be around $330. 
Jessica: That's… higher than I expected. I was hoping for something closer to $250. 
Agent: Let's see… we can extend the term to seven years. That would lower your monthly payment to around $275, but you'd pay a bit more in total interest over the life of the loan. 
Jessica: Hmm… what about fees? Are there any origination fees or prepayment penalties? 
Agent: There is a one-time origination fee of 1% of the loan amount, so $150 in your case. There are no prepayment penalties. You can pay off the loan early without any extra charges. 
Jessica: Okay, that's good. I'm also a little worried about my credit score. It's pretty good, but not perfect. 
Agent: Your credit score is excellent, Jessica. That's why we were able to offer you such a competitive rate. We do a soft pull for pre-approval, so it won't affect your score. 
Jessica: Okay, that sounds good. I think I'm ready to move forward with the application. 
Agent: Wonderful! Let's get started. I'll just need a few more details…

Agent: Hello, Michael? This is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Oh, yeah, I did. Just checking out my options. 
Agent: Great! We're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 17.99%. It comes with rewards points on all purchases. 
Michael: 17.99%? That's… pretty high, isn't it? I have a card with a lower rate. 
Agent: It is a bit higher, yes. However, our rewards program is very competitive. You earn 2% cash back on all purchases, and we often have special promotions. 
Michael: I appreciate that, but I think I'll stick with my current card for now. The interest rate is just too much. 
Agent: Okay, I understand. Would you like me to send you some information about our other products, perhaps a Personal Loan? 
Michael: No, thank you. I'm all set.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) Oh, here we go again! You guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at 24.99%. 
Patricia: 24.99?! Are you trying to rip me off? I'm on a fixed income, and my credit isn't great! 
Agent: We understand your situation, ma'am. We try to help as many people as possible… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) Well, you're not helping me! Take my number off your list! I want to be left alone! 
Agent: Okay, ma'am. I'll make a note of that. 
Patricia: Good! (Hangs up)
